name: Chocolate Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the butter into the flour using a pastry blender.
2. Mix in the chopped pecans.
3. Press the mixture into a 9x11 dish.
4. Bake at 325°F until golden, about 20 minutes. Allow to cool.
5. In a bowl, mix the cream cheese and powdered sugar until smooth.
6. Fold in the Cool Whip.
7. Spread over the cooled crust.
8. Beat together the remaining ingredients (chocolate pudding, vanilla pudding, and milk) until smooth.
9. Spread over the cheese mixture.
10. Spread additional Cool Whip on top.
11. Garnish with chopped pecans.
12. Chill.
